title: tragoselinum
intro: Tragoselinum is a type of plant, also known as burnet-sage or wild sage, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Tragoselinum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Tragoselinum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in salves and creams to support skin health.
